hy-611.product_introduction: HY-611 is a high-content silicone defoamer that provides long-lasting defoaming performance at low dosage without affecting the basic properties of the foaming system. It is a waterborne system, easy to dissolve in water, and suitable for water treatment, oil extraction, industrial cleaning and other aqueous systems.
features: Fast foam suppression and long-lasting defoaming.
Good spreading, penetration and heat resistance.
Strong chemical stability and oxidation resistance.
Strong stability, no oil floating and easy dilution.
Less prone to oil spots or coating craters and does not affect other system properties.
Environmentally friendly and solvent-free, with no corrosion, toxicity or adverse side effects.
Can be used in acid, alkali, electrolyte and hard-water systems.
how_to_use: Identify the cause and location of foam generation to control the defoamer addition point effectively.
Determine dosage according to foam severity and system characteristics. Add directly or after dilution.
Small-scale testing is recommended. Add evenly during production to ensure full contact between the defoamer and foam.
Recommended dosage is 0.1%-0.5% of the total system. Adjust the actual dosage according to foam conditions.
typical_applications: Water treatment
Metalworking fluids such as cutting fluids
Waterborne coatings, waterborne adhesives and water-soluble inks
Metal cleaning and industrial cleaning
Papermaking, building materials and textile printing/dyeing
Oilfield industry and desulfurization industry
Pesticide formulations, fermentation, mining/mineral processing, rubber and other aqueous defoaming systems
hy-611.storage: Store and transport as non-dangerous goods. Keep sealed.

typical_properties.appearance: Colorless to light yellow transparent liquid
typical_properties.water_solubility: Easily soluble or dispersible in water, appearing transparent to semi-transparent

hy8308.product_introduction: This product can be used as a spray modifier, foliar penetration promoter, and spreading agent. It is widely used in herbicides, foliar fertilizers, plant growth regulators, insecticides, and fungicides. It does not decompose pesticide active ingredients, significantly reduces solution surface tension, and enhances the wetting, penetration, adhesion, and spreading ability of pesticide solutions on plant leaves or insect bodies, significantly improving efficacy, reducing pesticide application amounts, reducing application frequency, saving water, reducing pesticide pollution, and protecting the environment.
features: Spreading: Contains nonionic surfactants, helps improve pesticide and fertilizer efficacy, saves time, improves droplet contact with plant or insect body surfaces, with excellent spreading performance.

Penetration: After field application, droplets dry quickly on leaf and fruit surfaces, remain dry, effectively preventing pesticide volatilization and loss. In rainy and foggy weather, leaf and fruit surfaces are not prone to water accumulation, preventing pathogen spore germination in high humidity environments.
Cost reduction: Improves efficacy, reduces pesticide usage, lowers pesticide application amounts, reduces application frequency.
how_to_use: Temporary mixing before pesticide spraying: Add directly to sprayer and mix with pesticide solution. Add 0.02~0.04% of total spray solution weight (e.g., add 3~6g HY8308 to 15kg sprayer).

Adding to pesticide formulation: Suitable for pesticide formulation production stage. Add directly to formulation. Add 0.5~5% of total pesticide formulation weight. Specific amount can be fine-tuned based on formulation type, target crops, and control requirements.

typical_properties.appearance: Colorless to light yellow transparent liquid
typical_properties.water_solubility: Readily soluble or dispersible in water to a clear solution

hy8328.product_introduction: HY-8328 is a high-activity specialty silicone surfactant, chemically polyether-modified heptamethyltrisiloxane. It provides low surface tension and excellent wetting, spreading, penetration, emulsification and dispersion.
features: Low surface tension with excellent wetting, spreading and penetration.
Quickly dissolves or disperses in water.
Enhances wetting, penetration, adhesion and spreading of spray solutions on plant leaves or pest surfaces.
Improves efficacy, reduces spray volume and application frequency, saves water and helps reduce pesticide pollution.
Can replace Dow Corning Q2-5211 product.
how_to_use: Can be added directly to pesticide formulations or used as a tank-mix adjuvant.
For tank mixing, use 0.02%-0.04% (add 3-6g HY-8328 to a 15kg sprayer).
In pesticide formulations, use 0.5%-5%.
typical_applications: Spray modifier
Foliar penetration and absorption adjuvant
Spreading agent
Herbicides, foliar fertilizers and plant growth regulators
Insecticides and fungicides
hy8328.storage: Store sealed at 5-30°C as non-dangerous goods. Avoid high temperature and contact with acidic or alkaline substances.

hy-329.product_introduction: This product is a high molecular weight polydimethylsiloxane polymer aqueous emulsion, effective even at low addition levels. In industrial applications, it is used for demolding automobile tires and other rubber products, serving as a release agent. In leather finishing, it provides wear resistance and a bright coating, acting as a bright smoothing agent. It can also be used as a leveling/wetting agent in water-based systems. This product can directly replace Dow Chemical's DOWSIL HV 495 product.
features: Excellent thermal stability
Easy to apply
Good slip properties, giving leather surfaces a greasy feel
Good wear resistance
Excellent dilution stability
High gloss/color intensity
Good surface wettability
Excellent release performance
how_to_use: Preparation: Usually needs to be diluted with water before use. It is recommended to conduct small-scale tests first to determine the appropriate dilution ratio. Molds should be cleaned before using the release agent.
Other Uses: Can be used as an exterior protectant, exterior wax, care agent and sealant, interior renovator, leather care agent, tire care agent, vinyl protectant, etc.
typical_applications: Industrial demolding and automotive and furniture care
Demolding of rubber products (e.g., shoe soles, tires)
Demolding of plastic products
Demolding of refractory materials

typical_properties.emulsion_type: Non-ionic emulsion with slight anionic properties

hy-3845.product_introduction: The product's emulsion particles are fine, uniformly dispersed, have high molecular weight, and good stability. It possesses film-forming, slippery, soft, elastic, and anti-wrinkle properties. This product can directly replace Elkem EMUL 8455 product.
features: Excellent thermal stability
Good hydrophilicity
Excellent release and isolation properties
Incompatible with many organic substances
how_to_use: Usually needs to be diluted with water before use. It is recommended to conduct small-scale tests first to determine the appropriate dilution ratio. Molds should be cleaned before using the release agent.
typical_applications: Natural leather brightener
Fabric and wool smoothing agent
Industrial rubber, tire, plastic, and casting material release agent
Maintenance product additive
Floor and furniture polish
Leather maintenance products

hy-302.product_introduction: This product is a special high-viscosity polydimethylsiloxane aqueous dispersion formula. The emulsion is highly stable, capable of handling shear forces even when highly diluted for ready-to-use applications. It boasts excellent wetting and spreading properties, allowing it to form a uniform and smooth film even at lower concentrations. The polydimethylsiloxane component provides extremely high release performance and resistance to mechanical stress. It is a general-purpose release agent that improves the appearance and surface quality of molded products. It can directly replace WACKER® E 22 product.
features: Excellent release capability
Good thermal stability
Low surface tension
Low volatility
Antioxidant
Environmentally friendly
how_to_use: Dilute the product with water by 0.5%-5%. The diluted emulsion can be used for dipping, brushing, and spraying. It is recommended to conduct small-scale tests first to determine the appropriate addition amount.
typical_applications: Formulated as a general-purpose release agent for rubber vulcanization
Used as an ironing aid in starch aerosol formulations
An additive in fabric softener formulations

hy-9072.product_introduction: HY-9072 is a waterborne, environmentally friendly lubricating release agent for die casting, designed for aluminum, zinc and magnesium alloy die casting with high-temperature resistance, isolation, lubrication, pressure resistance, oxidation resistance, anti-carbon buildup, non-corrosion and environmental performance.
features: Maintains high lubricity after 100x dilution and forms a nano-scale isolation film after spraying, reducing adhesion between molten metal and mold.
Silicone-based high-temperature lubricating matrix works with non-silicone components to avoid high-temperature carbonization and mold residue.
Produces smooth, bright cast surfaces after release without yellowing or blackening.
Waterborne formula with no harmful volatiles, meeting industrial environmental standards.
High-temperature film formation and lubrication suppress mold carbon buildup and extend mold life.
how_to_use: Dilute 1:100 (concentrate:water) and stir evenly before use. Deionized water helps improve anti-carbon buildup, corrosion resistance and surface finish.
Preheat mold to 150-200°C before spraying. Use an atomizing spray gun at 0.3-0.5MPa and spray evenly from 20-30cm away.
Spray 1-2 seconds per mold cycle to form an even transparent film. Process: mold cleaning, preheating, release-agent spraying, metal injection, cooling release and mold maintenance.
typical_applications: Aluminum alloy die-casting release
Zinc alloy die-casting release
Magnesium alloy die-casting release
Metal mold lubrication and protection
High-temperature die-casting processes
hy-9072.storage: Transport and store as non-dangerous goods. Store in a dry, ventilated and cool place at ≥5°C. Avoid strong sunlight and contact with acids or alkalis.

hy-ws30.product_introduction: HY-WS30 is a high-efficiency silicone emulsion defoamer with excellent defoaming performance, long-lasting foam suppression and good acid/alkali resistance. It is a waterborne system with good dilution stability, suitable for chemical, textile, detergent and agricultural formulation industries.
features: Fast defoaming.
Sustained foam suppression.
Strong alkali resistance.
Acid resistance.
Less prone to oil spots.
Good dilution stability.
how_to_use: Add during the process. Recommended dosage is 0.1%-0.5%, and testing is recommended to optimize the dosage.
If a feed pump is used, choose a low-shear type.
Formula engineers should optimize dosage according to the specific formulation system.
typical_applications: Chemical industry
Textile industry
Detergent systems
Agricultural formulations
Acid- and alkali-resistant aqueous defoaming systems
hy-ws30.storage: Store and transport as non-dangerous goods. Keep sealed.

typical_properties.appearance: The product appears as a transparent or semi-transparent uniform liquid

hy-3000.product_introduction: This product is a single-ended dihydroxy polydimethylsiloxane, designed as an organosilicon modifier specifically to enhance the performance of polyurethane resins. Unlike dihydroxy polydimethylsiloxane (e.g., Dow Corning DC-8427 or DC-3667) where organosilicon chains are incorporated into the main chain of modified polyurethane molecules in a block form, the organosilicon molecular chains in HY-3000 modified polyurethane are anchored at only one end to the main chain, with the other end remaining free. This unique structure allows the organosilicon molecular chains of HY-3000 modified polyurethane to more easily migrate to the coating surface, leading to more efficient hydrophobicity, oleophobicity, wear resistance, anti-sticking, and lubricating effects.
features: Excellent hydrophobicity and oleophobicity
Excellent wear resistance, anti-sticking, and lubricating properties
Enhances coating performance
how_to_use: Determine Addition Amount: Based on the polyurethane resin formula, determine the required amount of HY-3000. The recommended addition amount is approximately 5%.
Mixing: Add HY-3000 to the polyurethane resin raw material and stir thoroughly until uniform.
Reaction: Proceed with subsequent reactions according to the standard polyurethane resin synthesis process.
typical_applications: Modifier for Special Polyurethane Resins: It acts as a modifier for special polyurethane resins, which can be solvent-based, solvent-free, or water-based.

Coatings and Paints: These modified polyurethane resins are primarily used in coatings or paints. These coatings or paints serve as excellent alternatives to fluorine-containing materials for 'three-proof' (waterproof, oil-proof, anti-fouling) applications.
Downstream Markets: The downstream market applications include waterproof and anti-corrosion fields, such as marine engineering, ship coatings, and outdoor steel structure protection.

typical_properties.stability: No delamination or oil floating at 3000rpm

hy-501.product_introduction: This product can effectively enhance the adhesion between glass fibers and bundle hardness, with strong bundle cohesion. Glass fiber products treated with this product have thermoplastic properties and good compatibility with thermoplastic materials such as PA and PE, with good dispersibility in composite material systems.
features: Improved adhesion: The main function is to improve the adhesion between glass fibers and resins, prevent delamination and increase strength.
Enhanced mechanical properties: By improving fiber-matrix bonding, the sizing agent can increase the tensile strength, flexural strength, and impact strength of composite materials.
Improved durability: Better adhesion and reduced water absorption provide better resistance to humidity, chemicals, and other environmental factors.
Improved processing: Some sizing agents can also improve the processing methods of glass fibers, making them easier to handle, disperse, and integrate into composite materials.
how_to_use: When used as a composite material sizing agent, it is recommended to dilute with water. It is recommended to add 3-8 times water for dilution and stir evenly.
After diluting the sizing agent, add it to the sizing bath. The initial concentration can be slightly higher.

As the number of sizing cycles increases, the concentration of the agent in the sizing bath gradually decreases. It is necessary to regularly supplement the diluted agent, recommended to supplement once every 1-3 cycles.
The diluted agent should be used as soon as possible and not stored for long periods.
This product has strong adhesion. If the production interval exceeds 10 days, it is recommended to clean the sizing bath to prevent cured particles from affecting subsequent product quality.
typical_applications: Aerospace field: Aircraft fuselage, wings, tail fins and other main load-bearing structural components, spacecraft cabins, satellite supports, etc.

Wind power field: Wind turbine blades. Blades need to withstand long-term alternating loads and humid environments. The sizing agent needs to improve the interfacial fatigue resistance and water resistance between carbon fibers and epoxy resins, optimizing fiber bundling.
New energy vehicle field: Body frames, chassis components, battery housings, etc.

Textile weaving: Carbon fiber tows need to be woven into fabrics or braided into tubular shapes. The sizing agent improves bundling and anti-friction properties, reduces fly and breakage during weaving, ensuring fabric uniformity.

Pipes: In the winding process of pipes and other products, the sizing agent reduces friction between fibers, making the tows neatly arranged during winding, avoiding performance fluctuations due to uneven tension.

typical_properties.stability: No delamination or oil floating at 3000rpm

hy-503.product_introduction: HY-503 is a special modified macromolecular polymer emulsion designed for thermoplastic chopped carbon fiber processing, offering broad applicability and strong cost performance.
features: Designed for thermoplastic chopped carbon fiber sizing and processing.
Effectively enhances inter-fiber adhesion and bundle hardness with strong tow cohesion.
Treated carbon fiber products show thermoplastic behavior and good compatibility with PA, PE and other thermoplastics.
Provides good dispersion in composite material systems.
Shows positive synergy with conventional sizing agents, giving treated bundles a harder and smoother hand feel.
how_to_use: Coating method: suitable for conventional sizing processes such as dipping and spraying to ensure uniform coverage on the fiber surface.
typical_applications: Thermoplastic chopped carbon fiber processing
PA, PE and other thermoplastic composite systems
Carbon fiber sizing treatment
Composite material dispersion and bundle reinforcement
hy-503.storage: Store in a dry, ventilated and cool place. Shelf life is 6 months unopened.

hy-3689.product_introduction: HY-3689 is a water-dilutable tire bladder lubricating release agent composed of high-molecular-weight silicone dispersion, developed for tire production and suitable as an alternative to Dow DOWSIL FBL-3289.
features: Can be used alone as a release agent for tire or rubber vulcanization molding.
Can be combined with hydrogen silicone oil emulsion for tire bladder lubricating release coatings and tire internal spray release agents.
Forms a complete release-coating system with crosslinker, greatly increasing release cycles for permanent or semi-permanent release performance.
Formula can be adjusted through catalyst, curing time and water amount to match different spraying viscosity and application needs.
When used as a tire internal spray, it helps green tires release from the bladder and continuously renews the bladder release coating.
how_to_use: When used alone for tire or rubber vulcanization release, the release count can reach 1-10 times depending on dilution ratio and rubber vulcanization process.
Recommended formula: HY-3689 12.5%, water 57.5%, 40% hydrogen silicone oil emulsion 30%. Add water to HY-3689 first with strong stirring, then add the hydrogen silicone oil emulsion and mix evenly.
To avoid hydrogen release and premature crosslinking when adding hydrogen silicone oil emulsion, adjust the diluted HY-3689 to weak acidity at pH 5-6 with citric acid or acetic acid before mixing.
Bladder treatment can use roller coating, spraying or dip coating. Suggested predrying is 85°C for 3-5 minutes, followed by high-temperature curing at 150-170°C for 1-3 minutes.
New bladders should be thoroughly cleaned with xylene or petroleum solvent before pretreatment. Allow 1 hour of air drying after each application.
typical_applications: Tire bladder lubricating release in tire production
Rubber vulcanization molding release
Tire bladder lubricating release coatings
Tire internal spray release agents
Permanent or semi-permanent tire release systems
hy-3689.storage: Store unopened product at 0-35°C. Reactive mixtures should be continuously stirred when stored in open containers or hot curing areas; refrigerate and use vented containers for longer storage.

hy-59n.series: Long-Chain Alkyl Phenyl Modified Silicone Oil

typical_properties.appearance: Light yellow to colorless transparent liquid

hy-59n.product_introduction: HY-59N long-chain alkyl phenyl silicone oil is made through multi-component modification of organosilicon monomers/materials, with a unique structure and strong isolation/lubrication and heat-resistant performance.
features: Non-toxic and non-corrosive; can be diluted with alcohol solvents without harmful fumes.
Excellent lubricity and impact resistance for easy, damage-free demolding while protecting molds.
Easy to use and emulsify, and miscible with mineral oil in any proportion.
Provides lubricity, oil solubility, abrasion resistance, defoaming, anti-sticking and printability.
Strong affinity with organic materials and improves extreme-pressure lubrication of ordinary silicone oil.
how_to_use: Conduct small-sample trials first to determine the final application method and dosage for each use case.
Can be added in small amounts to mineral oil to improve high/low temperature resistance.
typical_applications: Lubrication and die-casting release for aluminum, magnesium, zinc and other metals
Base oil for high-lubricity silicone grease
Release for plastic, rubber and PU products
Audio/video tape production
Small machinery lubrication and plastic gear/rolling system lubrication
hy-59n.storage: Transport and store as non-dangerous goods. Store in a dry, ventilated and cool place at ≥5°C. Avoid strong sunlight and contact with acids or alkalis.

hy-19n.series: Long-Chain Alkyl Phenyl Modified Silicone Oil

typical_properties.appearance: Light yellow to colorless transparent liquid

hy-19n.product_introduction: HY-19N long-chain alkyl phenyl silicone oil is made through multi-component modification of organosilicon monomers/materials, providing strong isolation/lubrication performance and heat resistance.
features: Excellent lubricity and impact resistance for easy demolding and mold protection.
Easy to use and emulsify, and miscible with mineral oil in any proportion.
Provides lubricity, oil solubility, abrasion resistance, defoaming, anti-sticking and printability.
Strong affinity with organic materials; non-toxic and non-corrosive.
Improves extreme-pressure lubrication of ordinary silicone oil and mineral oil systems.
how_to_use: Conduct small-sample trials first to determine the final application method and dosage for each use case.
Can be added in small amounts to mineral oil to prepare high-value modified specialty oils.
typical_applications: Lubrication and die-casting release for aluminum, magnesium, zinc and other metals
Base oil for high-lubricity silicone grease
Release for plastic, rubber and PU products
Audio/video tape production
Small machinery lubrication and plastic gear/rolling system lubrication
hy-19n.storage: Transport and store as non-dangerous goods. Store in a dry, ventilated and cool place at ≥5°C. Avoid strong sunlight and contact with acids or alkalis.

typical_properties.stability: No delamination or oil floating at 3000rpm

hy-509.product_introduction: HY-509 is a special modified macromolecular polyurethane polymer emulsion designed for thermoplastic carbon fiber processing and scalable sizing production.
features: Strong interfacial bonding with carbon fiber, improving inter-fiber adhesion and bundle strength.
Treated fibers show good thermoplasticity and excellent compatibility with PA, PE, PU and other thermoplastic resins.
Provides good dispersion in composite systems and can enhance mechanical properties and wear resistance.
Emulsion formula with no solvent and almost no VOC emissions for environmental compliance.
Excellent dilution stability; after dilution with water, it can still be used normally the next day without delamination or sedimentation.
how_to_use: Coating method: suitable for conventional sizing processes such as dipping and spraying to ensure uniform coverage on the fiber surface.
typical_applications: Thermoplastic carbon fiber processing
PA, PE, PU and other thermoplastic resin composites
Scalable carbon fiber sizing production
Mechanical property and wear-resistance improvement for composites
hy-509.storage: Recommended storage temperature: 5-35°C. Shelf life is 6 months unopened.

hy-510.product_introduction: HY-510 is a special modified macromolecular polyurethane emulsion for thermoplastic carbon fiber processing. It can be used for carbon fiber, glass fiber and basalt fiber.
features: Strong interfacial bonding with carbon fiber, improving inter-fiber adhesion and bundle strength.
Treated fibers show good thermoplasticity and excellent compatibility with PA, PE, PU, PC and other thermoplastic resins.
Provides good dispersion in composite systems and can enhance mechanical properties and wear resistance.
Suitable for carbon fiber, glass fiber, basalt fiber and related fiber systems.
how_to_use: Coating method: suitable for conventional sizing processes such as dipping and spraying to ensure uniform coverage on the fiber surface.
typical_applications: Carbon fiber sizing treatment
Glass fiber sizing treatment
Basalt fiber sizing treatment
PA, PE, PU, PC and other thermoplastic composite systems
hy-510.storage: Recommended storage temperature: 10-35°C. Shelf life is 6 months unopened.

hy-512.product_introduction: HY-512 is a modified high-performance waterborne epoxy resin emulsion with a self-emulsifying system. It forms a uniform dense protective film on the fiber surface and improves interfacial bonding between fibers and the resin matrix.
features: Greatly improves interfacial bonding between fibers and resin matrix and increases interfacial shear strength.
Treated fibers disperse well in composite systems and can enhance tensile, flexural and surface wear properties.
Environmentally friendly solvent-free formula; dilutable with water and easy to use.
Excellent compatibility with mainstream thermoplastic resins such as PA and PC for thermoplastic composite molding processes.
Improves fiber bundling and wear resistance while reducing fuzzing and fiber breakage.
how_to_use: Coating method: suitable for conventional sizing processes such as dipping and spraying to ensure uniform coverage on the fiber surface.
typical_applications: Carbon fiber sizing treatment (PAN/pitch based, filament/chopped fiber)
Basalt fiber sizing treatment
Glass fiber sizing treatment
PA, PC and other thermoplastic composite systems
hy-512.storage: Recommended storage temperature: 5-35°C. Shelf life is 6 months unopened.

typical_properties.stability: No delamination, oil floating or impurities

hy-518.product_introduction: HY-518 is a dedicated sizing agent developed for polypropylene (PP) matrix composites. It uses functional polymer-modified polypropylene design to improve interfacial shear strength between fibers and resin.
features: Forms a protective film on the fiber surface and greatly improves interfacial bonding.
Treated fibers show good thermoplasticity, good dispersion in composites and excellent chopped processing performance.
Significantly enhances mechanical properties and wear resistance of composite materials.
Improves fiber bundling and wear resistance while reducing fuzzing and fiber breakage.
Waterborne emulsion system with no solvent, low ppm and no VOC emissions.
how_to_use: Coating method: suitable for conventional sizing processes such as dipping and spraying to ensure uniform coverage on the fiber surface.
typical_applications: Polypropylene (PP) matrix composites
Carbon fiber sizing treatment
Basalt fiber sizing treatment
Glass fiber and other chemical fiber sizing treatment
hy-518.storage: Recommended storage temperature: 5-35°C. Shelf life is 6 months unopened.

typical_properties.solvent: Ethylene glycol (solvent type adjustable as needed)

hy-104e.product_introduction: HY-104E is a nonionic surfactant with wetting, defoaming and dispersing performance. It rapidly reduces dynamic and static surface tension, controls foam and helps reduce water sensitivity.
features: Rapidly reduces dynamic and static surface tension to reduce defects on low-energy or contaminated substrates.
Provides defoaming, deaeration and low-foaming effects, reducing defoamer dosage and improving pigment grinding efficiency.
Wets a wide range of contaminated substrates and does not form micelles.
Good thermal stability and acid/alkali stability, maintaining chemical stability from pH 3 to pH 12.
Helps reduce pigment particle size and prevents re-agglomeration.
how_to_use: Recommended dosage: 0.1%-2%. HY-104E is multifunctional and can replace one or more formulation additives. Gradient testing is recommended to determine the optimum dosage.
typical_applications: Waterborne industrial coatings
Waterborne inks, varnishes and dye manufacturing
Waterborne wood coatings, pressure-sensitive adhesives and plastic coatings
Metalworking fluids
Glove latex and agricultural chemicals
Defoamer and deaerator for coatings, inks, cement and dyes
hy-104e.storage: Store between 4°C and 50°C. If solidification or crystallization occurs at low temperature, heat above the melting point and stir moderately to restore.

hy-302-wetting.product_introduction: HY-302 is a modified siloxane gemini surfactant for waterborne systems, combining wetting and penetration, defoaming and foam suppression, lubrication, abrasion resistance and long-term stability.
features: Surface tension as low as 24mN/m with excellent wetting and penetration.
Non-foaming by itself and provides defoaming and foam suppression.
Outstanding oxidation resistance and high/low temperature resistance.
Excellent compatibility with water-glycol systems and can be compounded with dispersants and corrosion inhibitors.
Good compatibility with resins and additives, without affecting recoating processes.
how_to_use: Compatibility testing is recommended before use. Recommended dosage: 1%-2%.
typical_applications: Waterborne coatings
Waterborne inks
Waterborne adhesives
Waterborne wood coatings
Waterborne industrial coatings
Waterborne floor coatings
hy-302-wetting.storage: Store in a ventilated, cool and dry place. Avoid contact with strong acids and alkalis. Warehouse temperature should be 5-40°C.

hy-9102.product_name: HY-9102 Acrylic Textile Coating Wetting Agent

typical_properties.appearance: Light yellow, free-flowing, transparent and homogeneous oily liquid

hy-9102.product_introduction: HY-9102 is a silicone nonionic surfactant made by graft copolymerization of polyether and polydimethylsiloxane. It is suitable for wetting, dispersing and leveling in acrylic textile coating systems.
features: Low surface tension.
Good softening and antistatic properties.
Good viscosity reduction and leveling, improving intermolecular stress in many resin systems.
Good lubricity, suitable for high-grade cutting fluids.
Miscible with water and polar organic solvents such as alcohols, DMF, ethers and esters, making it easy to use.
how_to_use: As a softener, use 1%-5% in padding or dipping bath.
As a leveling agent, use 0.1%-1% in the system.
For other applications, use 0.1%-10% as a reference dosage or determine by pilot testing.
typical_applications: Textile finishing agent
Wetting and dispersing agent for textile printing adhesives
Acrylic printing adhesive
Coating, paint and plastic resin systems
High-grade cutting fluids
Oil-water separation in specific applications
hy-9102.storage: Avoid sun exposure and store below 30°C. Store separately in a ventilated place away from oxidizers and other chemicals.
hy-9102.shelf_life: Transport and store as non-dangerous goods

typical_properties.process: Gravure printing, spraying, knife coating and reverse roll coating
typical_properties.crosslinker: A crosslinker can be added to improve physical properties

hy-1617.product_introduction: HY-1617 is a silicone-modified polyurethane dispersion with high gloss, high transparency, abrasion resistance, anti-blocking performance and yellowing resistance for waterborne coatings requiring a premium appearance.
features: Silicone-modified polyurethane dispersion for high-gloss transparent coating systems.
Provides high gloss, high transparency, abrasion resistance, anti-blocking performance and yellowing resistance.
VOC-free and suitable for waterborne environmentally conscious formulations.
Suitable for high-appearance applications such as crystal leather, mirror leather, high-gloss coatings and aluminum foil printing coatings.
Crosslinker can be added to further improve overall film properties.
how_to_use: Suitable for gravure printing, spraying, knife coating and reverse roll coating. Adjust drying time and crosslinker dosage according to coating thickness.
typical_applications: Leather finishing, including crystal leather, mirror leather and high-gloss PU leather
Waterborne coatings, including high-gloss furniture coatings, plastic coatings and metal anticorrosive coatings
Packaging printing, including high-gloss printing coatings for aluminum foil and BOPP film
Protective films, including waterborne peelable films and temporary protective films
Textile printing with waterborne textile printing binders
hy-1617.storage: Store sealed in a dry, cool and ventilated place. Avoid direct sunlight, moisture and high temperature.

hy-1625.product_introduction: HY-1625 is an aqueous sodium salt dispersion of modified polysiloxane resin. It improves compatibility between polysiloxane and polyurethane or acrylic resin systems while enhancing surface slip, abrasion resistance, anti-blocking, transparency and gloss.
features: Improves molecular compatibility between polysiloxane and polyurethane or acrylic resins.
Gives the formed film a smooth, abrasion-resistant and anti-blocking surface.
Significantly improves coating transparency and gloss.
VOC-free with pure water as the solvent.
Can coexist with water-soluble solvents such as ethanol and water in any ratio.
how_to_use: Add directly into the waterborne resin system according to the metered ratio, then stir or grind until uniform.
Recommended dosage is 1%-3% of the total system when converted to 100% solid content. Confirm the final dosage through formulation testing.
typical_applications: Waterborne coatings, inks or leather finishes requiring high transparency and high gloss
Crystal leather or mirror leather finishes based on waterborne PU resin
Aluminum foil printing coatings using waterborne acrylic resin as the main carrier resin
Waterborne polyurethane/acrylic resin peelable film systems
Waterborne textile printing binder systems
hy-1625.storage: Store sealed in a dry, cool and ventilated place. Avoid direct sunlight, moisture and high temperature.

typical_properties.process: Gravure printing, spraying, knife coating, reverse roll coating, etc.
typical_properties.crosslinker: A crosslinker can be added to improve physical properties

hy-5100.product_introduction: HY-5100 is a high-performance waterborne polyurethane emulsion with high gloss, good transparency, excellent yellowing resistance, strong adhesion, scratch resistance, water resistance and solvent resistance.
features: High-gloss grade with good film transparency.
Excellent yellowing resistance for high-appearance coatings.
Good adhesion with scratch resistance.
Good water resistance and solvent resistance.
Crosslinker can be added to improve overall film properties.
how_to_use: Suitable for gravure printing, spraying, knife coating and reverse roll coating. Recommended drying condition: 90-150°C.
typical_applications: High-gloss waterborne coatings
Transparent coating systems
Waterborne coatings requiring strong yellowing resistance
Coating applications requiring adhesion, scratch resistance, water resistance and solvent resistance

hy-612.product_introduction: HY-612 is an efficient silicone defoamer designed for food-processing and fermentation defoaming scenarios. It provides fast defoaming, long-lasting foam suppression and good dispersion. The waterborne system dissolves easily in water and works quickly at low dosage.
features: Designed for food-related defoaming and fermentation process defoaming.
Fast defoaming, long foam suppression time and good dispersion.
Stable physical and chemical properties; does not react with materials in the foaming system or affect product quality.
After high-temperature sterilization, it can automatically restore the emulsion state, reducing performance loss from oil-water separation or layering.
Strong stability, no oil floating and easy dilution.
Less prone to oil spots or coating craters and does not affect other system properties.
Environmentally friendly and solvent-free.
how_to_use: Identify the cause and location of foam generation to control the defoamer addition point effectively.
Determine dosage according to foam severity and system characteristics. Add directly or after dilution.
Small-scale testing is recommended. Add evenly during production to ensure full contact between the defoamer and foam.
Recommended dosage is 0.1%-0.5% of the total system. Adjust the actual dosage according to foam conditions.
typical_applications: Soy products and beer brewing
Waterborne coating production
Fermentation industries such as antibiotics, glutamic acid, lysine, xanthan gum and citric acid
Fermentation processes for erythromycin, lincomycin, avermectin, gentamicin, penicillin, citric acid, lysine and yeast production
Textile printing/dyeing, oilfield, sugar production and wastewater treatment defoaming
hy-612.storage: Store and transport as non-dangerous goods. Keep sealed.

hy-190.product_introduction: HY-190 is a VOC-free and solvent-free wetting and dispersing agent for waterborne coating systems, printing inks and adhesives. It is a standard additive for resin-free pigment concentrates and is suitable for a wide range of pigments.
features: VOC-free and solvent-free, suitable for environmentally conscious waterborne formulations.
Provides wetting and dispersing performance for waterborne coatings, printing inks and adhesive systems.
Suitable as a standard additive for resin-free pigment concentrates.
Applicable to inorganic pigments, titanium dioxide, organic pigments, carbon black and other pigment systems.
how_to_use: Add to the millbase before dispersion. Dosage in supplied form is calculated based on pigment content.
Recommended dosage: 2%-10% for inorganic pigments, 2%-5% for titanium dioxide, 20%-50% for organic pigments and 20%-50% for carbon black.
Recommended dosage for co-grinding is 0.5%-2% based on the total formulation. The optimum dosage should be determined through testing.
typical_applications: Waterborne coatings
Waterborne inks
Waterborne pigment pastes
Resin-free pigment concentrates
Wetting and dispersing systems for a wide range of pigments
hy-190.storage: Store sealed at room temperature in a dry, cool and ventilated place. Avoid direct sunlight.
hy-190.shelf_life: 1 year in unopened original containers when stored at room temperature

indicators.solubility: Soluble in water and alcohol solvents

hy-204.product_introduction: HY-204 is a non-hazardous silicone multifunctional additive with no hazardous components. It is chemically stable, non-flammable and combines surface activity, release and dispersing functions.
features: Silicone multifunctional additive with no hazardous components.
Chemically stable, non-flammable and environmentally friendly.
Combines surface activity, release and dispersing functions.
Soluble in water and alcohol solvents with good compatibility.
Suitable for food alcohol, cosmetics, rubber/plastic processing, PU slurry, waterborne coatings and ink systems.
how_to_use: Add directly to the target system or dilute with water or alcohol solvents before addition. Adjust the dilution ratio as needed.

When used as an additive or dispersant, the recommended dosage is 0.1%-2% of the total system. Adjust according to application requirements and performance testing; the optimum dosage should be determined by trials.
typical_applications: Food alcohol systems
Cosmetic systems
Rubber and plastic processing systems
PU slurry systems
Waterborne coating and ink systems
hy-204.packaging: 25kg, 50kg, 100kg plastic drums; customizable according to customer requirements
hy-204.storage: Store below 30°C in a dry, cool and well-ventilated place. Avoid direct sunlight. Store separately away from oxidizers and other chemical products.
hy-204.shelf_life: 1 year in unopened original containers when stored under specified conditions

indicators.appearance: Colorless to light yellow transparent liquid
indicators.water_solubility: Easily dissolves or disperses in water to form a transparent solution

hy-8328-modified-silicone.product_introduction: Polyether-modified heptamethyltrisiloxane HY-8328 is a high-activity specialty silicone surfactant with low surface tension and excellent wetting, spreading, penetration, emulsification and dispersing performance.
features: High-activity specialty silicone surfactant.
Low surface tension with excellent wetting, spreading, penetration, emulsification and dispersing performance.
Quickly and easily dissolves or disperses in water.
Can be used as a new high-efficiency agricultural adjuvant and as an alternative to Dow Corning Q2-5211.
how_to_use: Add directly into pesticide formulations or use as a tank-mix adjuvant.
For tank mixing, recommended dosage is 0.02%-0.04% (3-6 g in a 15 kg sprayer).
In pesticide formulations, recommended dosage is 0.5%-5%.
typical_applications: Spray modifier
Foliar penetration and absorption aid
Spreading agent
Herbicides, foliar fertilizers and plant growth regulators
Insecticides and fungicides
hy-8328-modified-silicone.storage: Store sealed away from direct sunlight. Transport and store as non-dangerous goods.

hy-demmas.product_introduction: HY-DEMMAS bis-methacrylate terminated polydimethylsiloxane is a modified silicone material that combines the flexibility and heat resistance of PDMS with the curability of methacrylate groups, enabling crosslinking through free-radical polymerization.
features: Excellent oxidation resistance, high/low temperature resistance and weatherability.
Excellent water resistance and stain resistance with lubricity.
Good compatibility with metal, plastic, rubber and other substrates.
Customizable mono- or di-end-capped structures and molecular weight distribution from 1000 to 100000.
Mainly used in contact lens and other optical/medical material applications.
how_to_use: Use as a key monomer, resin modifier, leveling/slip additive or functional coating component. Dosage should be determined by testing according to curing system, molecular weight and target properties.
typical_applications: Silicone hydrogel contact lenses
Dental repair materials and orthodontic appliances
UV-curable scratch-resistant, anti-fingerprint and optical fiber coatings
Electronic encapsulation and insulation protection
Leveling and slip additives for inks and paints
Flexibility and weatherability modification for acrylic and epoxy resins
Release paper and label back coatings
hy-demmas.storage: Non-dangerous goods. Recommended storage temperature: 5-35°C. Keep sealed.

indicators.grade_1200: Average molecular weight: 1200; appearance: colorless transparent liquid; viscosity at 25°C: 20-30 mPa·s; hydroxyl equivalent weight: 600 g/mol; hydroxyl value: 93.5
indicators.grade_2300: Average molecular weight: 2300; appearance: colorless transparent liquid; viscosity at 25°C: 35 mPa·s; hydroxyl equivalent weight: 1150 g/mol; hydroxyl value: 48.78

bis-hydroxypropyl-polysiloxane.product_introduction: Bis-hydroxypropyl terminated polydimethylsiloxane is a bifunctional reactive silicone diol with reactive hydroxypropyl groups at both molecular ends. It can undergo polycondensation with isocyanate, epoxy and carboxyl groups.
features: Bis-hydroxypropyl reactive structure with high activity and stable functionality.
Can fully participate in resin crosslinking and curing, reducing migration and blooming.
Combines low surface energy, high flexibility, weatherability, hydrophobicity and stain resistance.
Good compatibility with polyurethane, epoxy and acrylic resins.
Improves flexibility, high/low temperature resistance, impact resistance and elongation at break.
Provides durable slip, hydrophobic anti-blocking, abrasion/scratch resistance, stain resistance and anti-graffiti performance.
how_to_use: Use as a crosslinker, chain extender or soft-segment monomer in foams, composites, adhesives, sealants, elastomers and modified resin systems. Dosage should be determined by target molecular weight and reaction-system testing.
typical_applications: Silicone-modified polyurethane
Silicone-modified epoxy resin
Waterborne polyurethane dispersion (PUD)
Sealants and elastomers
Superhydrophobic, anticorrosive and durable coatings
Adhesives and composites
Waterproof textile finishing agents
Personal-care emulsifiers and conditioners
Polymer modification and thermal-performance improvement for engineering plastics
bis-hydroxypropyl-polysiloxane.storage: Store sealed in a cool and ventilated place. Different molecular weights and mono-/di-end-capped structures can be customized.

hy-evipaps.product_introduction: HY-EVIPAPS bis-vinyl polyalkylaryl siloxane is a high-activity bifunctional modified silicone intermediate combining the heat resistance, weatherability and compatibility of polyalkylaryl siloxane with the curability of vinyl groups.
features: High bis-vinyl activity with fast UV/thermal curing.
Aryl groups improve heat resistance and thermal stability compared with ordinary silicone oil.
Good compatibility with organic resins and inorganic fillers, reducing blooming, layering and cratering issues.
Can be covalently incorporated into the resin backbone for non-migrating, durable performance after curing.
One additive provides curing, heat resistance, flexibility and hydrophobic modification.
100% active content with no solvent or volatile components.
how_to_use: Use as a bis-vinyl reactive intermediate in UV-curing, thermal-curing or resin-modification systems. Dosage should be determined by formulation and target-performance testing.
typical_applications: High-performance UV/thermal-curing coatings
Electronic encapsulation adhesives, insulating coatings and thermal gels
Epoxy, acrylic and polyurethane composite modification
High-performance silicone adhesives and sealants
Optical lenses and optical fiber coatings
Intermediate for modified acrylic, epoxy and polyurethane resins
hy-evipaps.storage: Store sealed in a cool and ventilated place. Avoid high temperature and direct sunlight.

indicators.grade_2000: Average molecular weight: 2000; appearance: colorless transparent liquid; viscosity at 25°C: 29 mPa·s; epoxy content: 0.48 mmol/g; epoxy value: 0.048 mol/100g
indicators.grade_5000: Average molecular weight: 5000; appearance: colorless transparent liquid; viscosity at 25°C: 68 mPa·s; epoxy content: 0.2 mmol/g; epoxy value: 0.02 mol/100g

hy-sees.product_introduction: HY-SEES mono-epoxy-terminated polydimethylsiloxane is a functional silicone material used as a modifier, additive or crosslinker for organic resins such as epoxy resin, providing excellent thermal stability, acid/alkali resistance, hydrophobicity and anti-blocking performance.
features: Can upgrade resin performance as a modifier and also serve as an intermediate for specialty polymer synthesis.
Improves impact strength and elongation at break of epoxy resin, making materials tougher and more flexible.
The polysiloxane segment provides excellent hydrophobicity and improves water and moisture resistance in coatings and adhesives.
Good thermal and chemical stability enhances durability under harsh conditions.
Provides good compatibility and uniform dispersion in polar epoxy resin matrices.
Can be used as part of a synergistic flame-retardant system to improve fire safety ratings.
how_to_use: Use as a resin modifier, additive, crosslinker or specialty polymer intermediate. Molecular weight from 1000 to 100000 and other end-capped structures can be customized; dosage should be determined by formulation testing.
typical_applications: Paints and coating systems
Adhesives and sealants
Intermediate for textile finishing agents
Electronic encapsulation, insulation and thermal materials
Flexibility and strength modification for organic resins
hy-sees.storage: Store sealed in a cool, ventilated place. Transport and store as non-dangerous goods.

indicators.grade_2000: Average molecular weight: 2000; appearance: colorless transparent liquid; viscosity at 25°C: 25-35 mPa·s; double-bond equivalent weight: 2800; double-bond content: 0.48 mmol/g
indicators.grade_5000: Average molecular weight: 5000; appearance: colorless transparent liquid; viscosity at 25°C: 70 mPa·s; double-bond equivalent weight: 5000; double-bond content: 0.2 mmol/g

hy-semmas.product_introduction: HY-SEMMAS mono-methacrylate terminated polydimethylsiloxane is a modified silicone material that combines the flexibility and heat resistance of PDMS with the curability of methacrylate groups, enabling crosslinking through free-radical polymerization.
features: Excellent oxidation resistance, high/low temperature resistance and weatherability.
Excellent water resistance and stain resistance with lubricity.
Good compatibility with metal, plastic, rubber and other substrates.
Customizable mono- or di-end-capped structures and molecular weight distribution from 1000 to 100000.
Mainly used in contact lens and other optical/medical material applications.
how_to_use: Use as a key monomer, leveling/slip additive, functional coating component or resin modifier. Dosage should be determined by testing according to curing system, molecular weight and target properties.
typical_applications: Silicone hydrogel contact lenses
Dental repair materials and orthodontic appliances
UV-curable scratch-resistant, anti-fingerprint and optical fiber coatings
Electronic encapsulation protection
Leveling and slip additives for inks and paints
Flexibility and weatherability modification for acrylic and epoxy resins
Release paper, tape and label back coatings
hy-semmas.storage: Non-dangerous goods. Recommended storage temperature: 5-35°C. Keep sealed.

indicators.grade_2500: Average molecular weight: 2500; appearance: colorless transparent liquid; viscosity at 25°C: 33 mPa·s; methoxy content: 1.19 mmol/g; active content: 100%

hy-stmos.product_introduction: HY-STMOS mono-trimethoxy-terminated polydimethylsiloxane is a reactive functional silicone intermediate combining low surface energy, high flexibility and weatherability with the reactive activity of a silane coupling group.
features: The molecule uses a linear PDMS backbone with one inert hydrophobic siloxane segment and one hydrolyzable trimethoxysilane end group.
Can undergo hydrolysis-condensation in waterborne or solventborne systems for self-crosslinking or chemical bonding with hydroxyl groups on inorganic substrates and fillers.
Improves hydrophobicity, weatherability, adhesion and interfacial compatibility in composites, coatings and adhesives.
Molecular weight from 1000 to 100000 and other end-capped structures can be customized.
Also known as reactive PDMS mono-alkoxysilyl or mono-end reactive siloxane.
how_to_use: Use as a high-performance modifier, crosslinking monomer or filler surface treatment agent. For hydroxyl-containing inorganic fillers, coatings, adhesives and composites, determine addition method and dosage through trials.
typical_applications: Dispersion and surface modification of inorganic fillers
Waterborne or solventborne functional coatings
Adhesive and sealant modification
Thermal gels, thermal grease and thermal pads
Epoxy, acrylic and polyurethane composite modification
hy-stmos.storage: Store sealed in a cool, ventilated place. Avoid high temperature and direct sunlight.

indicators.grade_2000: Average molecular weight: 2000; appearance: colorless transparent liquid; viscosity at 25°C: 80 mPa·s; hydroxyl equivalent weight: 1000 g/mol; hydroxyl value: 56
indicators.grade_3000: Average molecular weight: 3000; appearance: colorless transparent liquid; viscosity at 25°C: 60 mPa·s; hydroxyl equivalent weight: 1500 g/mol; hydroxyl value: 37
indicators.grade_4000: Average molecular weight: 4000; appearance: colorless transparent liquid; viscosity at 25°C: 135 mPa·s; hydroxyl equivalent weight: 2000 g/mol; hydroxyl value: 28
indicators.grade_5000: Average molecular weight: 5000; appearance: colorless transparent liquid; viscosity at 25°C: 165 mPa·s; hydroxyl equivalent weight: 2500 g/mol; hydroxyl value: 22

mono-dihydroxy-pdms.product_introduction: Mono-end dihydroxy polydimethylsiloxane can be introduced into a polyurethane backbone in block form while the other silicone chain end remains free, allowing rapid migration to the coating surface for hydrophobic/oleophobic, abrasion-resistant, anti-blocking and slip performance.
features: Can react chemically with -NCO, -NH2, -COOH and other groups.
Mainly used in silicone-modified PU, PUD, TPU and modified polyester or acrylic resin systems.
Improves lubricity and abrasion resistance while providing water repellency, anti-blocking, anti-staining and anti-graffiti functions.
Good compatibility with metal, plastic, rubber and other substrates.
Improves scratch resistance, UV stability and heat resistance.
Low surface energy helps create anti-blocking and stain-resistant surfaces and improves fabric hand feel.
Can be used as an alternative to Shin-Etsu X-22-176DX and similar grades.
how_to_use: Use as a reactive modifier for silicone-modified polyurethane, PUD, TPU, polyester resin and acrylic resin systems. Molecular weight from 1000 to 100000 and other end-capped structures can be customized; optimum dosage should be determined by formulation testing.
typical_applications: Heat-resistant coatings, architectural coatings, anticorrosive coatings and protective varnishes
Clear abrasion-resistant automotive coatings
Marine antifouling coating modification
Finishing agents for sportswear, home textiles and apparel fabrics
Protective coatings for electronic housings and precision parts
Tackifiers, silicone stone adhesives and structure-control agents for high-temperature adhesives
Base silicone oil for thermal grease
mono-dihydroxy-pdms.storage: Non-dangerous goods. Recommended storage temperature: 5-35°C. Keep sealed.

hy-1380.product_introduction: HY-1380 is a cationic antistatic softening agent combining antistatic performance, soft fluffy hand feel and cool smooth touch. The self-emulsifying system can be diluted directly with water and is suitable for polyester, nylon and synthetic wig fiber finishing.
features: Cationic groups adsorb to negatively charged chemical fiber surfaces and form a uniform flexible protective film.
Provides a dry, non-greasy hand feel while suppressing static generation over time.
Improves softness, fluffiness, antistatic performance, combability and washing durability of wig fibers.
Self-emulsifying system, directly diluted with water without additional emulsifier.
Environmentally friendly and suitable for polyester, nylon and other chemical fiber fabrics.
how_to_use: Dilute with deionized water to avoid hard-water effects. Stir evenly during dilution and do not pour concentrate directly onto fabric.
Recommended base dilution ratio is 1%-2% (1 kg product with 25-50 kg water). Adjust concentration according to on-site conditions and hand-feel requirements.
Can be compounded with nonionic antistatic agents, smoothers and water repellents. Do not mix with anionic auxiliaries.
typical_applications: Pretreatment and soft antistatic finishing of synthetic wig fibers
Soft, skin-friendly and antistatic finishing for polyester filament, nylon fabrics and blended garments
Finishing of synthetic blankets, coral fleece, flannel, polyester bedding and nylon curtains
Finishing of polyester yarns, chemical fiber nonwovens and industrial textiles
hy-1380.storage: Store sealed in a cool, dry and ventilated place at 5-35°C. Keep container sealed after use and avoid moisture and high temperature.

hy-1390.product_introduction: HY-1390 is a cationic antistatic softener designed with a special molecular structure to provide antistatic and soft fluffy performance. It is a self-emulsifying product that can be diluted directly with water for chemical fiber and blended textile finishing.
features: Cationic groups adsorb to negatively charged chemical fiber surfaces and form a uniform flexible protective film.
Provides a dry, non-greasy fabric hand feel and long-lasting antistatic effect.
Improves softness, fluffiness, antistatic performance and process adaptability of wig fibers.
Self-emulsifying system, directly diluted with water without additional emulsifier.
Environmentally friendly and suitable for polyester, nylon and synthetic wig fibers.
how_to_use: Dilute with deionized water to avoid hard-water effects. Stir evenly during dilution and do not pour concentrate directly onto fabric.
Recommended base dilution ratio is 1%-2% (1 kg product with 25-50 kg water). Adjust concentration according to on-site conditions and hand-feel requirements.
Can be compounded with nonionic antistatic agents, smoothers and water repellents. Do not mix with anionic auxiliaries.
typical_applications: Pretreatment of synthetic wig fibers to reduce tangling and improve combability
Soft and antistatic finishing for apparel fabrics
Fuller pile feel and reduced pilling for home textile fabrics
Improved smoothness and softness for yarns and industrial textiles
hy-1390.storage: Store sealed in a cool, dry and ventilated place at 5-35°C. Keep container sealed after use and avoid moisture and high temperature.

indicators.shaping_hardness: Firm hand feel (adjustable by concentration; higher concentration gives stronger shaping)
indicators.setting_durability: Wash durable for 5-8 cycles with no obvious loss of setting effect

hy-5100-textile.product_introduction: HY-5100 is a cationic antistatic shaping agent combining antistatic, shaping/setting and moderate softening performance. The self-emulsifying product can be diluted directly with water and is suitable for chemical fiber fabrics and wig fibers requiring a firmer, shaped hand feel.
features: Specially modified molecular structure forms a uniform dense setting protective film.
Suppresses static generation while giving fabric or fibers a firm, crisp hand feel.
Long-lasting shaping effect without brittleness or stiffness; resists deformation and collapse.
Balances antistatic performance, moderate softness and process adaptability.
Environmentally friendly and suitable for polyester, nylon and other chemical fiber fabrics.
how_to_use: Dilute directly with water for antistatic shaping and setting finishing of chemical fiber and blended textiles. Adjust concentration according to target stiffness and hand feel; trial testing is recommended.
typical_applications: Pretreatment and finished-product setting for synthetic wig fibers
Styled wigs, short wigs and products requiring a firm structured feel
Polyester filament, nylon fabrics, collars, cuffs, suit shoulder pads and workwear fabrics
Chemical fiber decorative fabrics, curtains, tablecloths and sofa covers
Polyester yarns, chemical fiber nonwovens and shaped industrial filter fabrics
hy-5100-textile.storage: Store sealed in a cool, dry and ventilated place at 5-35°C. Keep container sealed after use and avoid moisture and high temperature.

hy-d70n.product_introduction: HY-D70N is a silicone quaternary ammonium antibacterial and antimildew agent for textile finishing. It can effectively kill bacteria on fabric surfaces, inhibit mold growth, and improve fabric softness and fullness.
features: Silicone quaternary ammonium antibacterial and antimildew system with good textile-finishing compatibility.
Effectively kills bacteria on fabric surfaces and inhibits mold growth.
Improves fabric softness and fullness with a more skin-friendly touch.
Suitable for towels, knitwear, nonwoven wet wipes, disposable bedding and related textile applications.
Suitable for white textile finishing and helps reduce appearance issues caused by yellowing.
how_to_use: Prepare a stable water dispersion by mixing the product with emulsifier and deionized water under conventional emulsification conditions.
Further dilute the prepared dispersion so that HY-D70N reaches 0.5%-1% in the working bath.
Mainly suitable for padding and spraying processes. Trial testing is recommended before production use.
typical_applications: Antibacterial, antimildew and soft finishing for nonwoven wet wipes
Antibacterial and antimildew finishing with whiteness retention for white disposable bedding
Antibacterial, antistatic and anti-yellowing finishing for white knitwear
Soft finishing, antibacterial protection and odor control for towels
hy-d70n.storage: Store sealed in a cool, dry and ventilated place at 5-35°C. Keep container sealed after use and avoid moisture and high temperature.

hy-d1810.product_introduction: HY-D1810 is an epoxy-terminated silicone oil antibacterial and antimildew agent for textile finishing. It can effectively kill bacteria on fabric surfaces, inhibit mold growth, and improve softness. Its excellent anti-yellowing performance makes it especially suitable for applications requiring strong whiteness retention.
features: Epoxy-terminated silicone oil antibacterial and antimildew system for textile finishing.
Effectively kills bacteria on fabric surfaces and inhibits mold growth.
Improves fabric softness and daily-use comfort.
Excellent anti-yellowing performance helps maintain the original fabric color.
Suitable for towels, white knitwear, nonwoven wet wipes, white disposable bedding and related textile applications.
how_to_use: Prepare a stable water dispersion by mixing the product with emulsifier and deionized water under conventional emulsification conditions.
Further dilute the prepared dispersion so that HY-D1810 reaches 0.5%-1% in the working bath.
For textile antibacterial and antimildew finishing, trial testing is recommended according to target hand feel and whiteness-retention requirements.
typical_applications: Antibacterial, antimildew and soft finishing for nonwoven wet wipes
Antibacterial and antimildew finishing with whiteness retention for white disposable bedding
Antibacterial, antistatic and anti-yellowing finishing for white knitwear
Soft finishing, antibacterial protection and odor control for towels
hy-d1810.storage: Store sealed in a cool, dry and ventilated place at 5-35°C. Keep container sealed after use and avoid moisture and high temperature.

hy-1303.product_introduction: HY-1303 Nonionic Softener is a fatty-acid and polyol compound high-end softener for textile fabric soft finishing. The beige or snow-white flake product has a mild odor and good compatibility, giving fibers a full, soft and smooth hand feel while resisting yellowing and minimizing shade impact. It is suitable for high-grade finishing where whiteness and shade stability are important.
features: Nonionic system with good compatibility for multiple fabric finishing processes.
Gives fabrics a full, soft and smooth hand feel.
Resists yellowing and helps maintain shade and whiteness.
Suitable for high-grade fabrics and finishing processes with strict shade requirements.
Environmentally friendly and transported as non-dangerous goods.
how_to_use: Use hot-water preparation. Add softener flakes into room-temperature water at 5%-10%.
Heat to 70-80°C with stirring, hold and stir for about 30 minutes until a uniform paste is formed.
Cool before packaging or use in finishing. Trial testing is recommended according to fabric type and target hand feel.
typical_applications: After-finishing of cotton and blended yarns and fabrics in dyeing mills
Soft and fluffy finishing of denim garments, washed fabrics and sweaters
Thick, soft finishing of new towels
Soft hand-feel finishing for high-whiteness and light-colored fabrics
hy-1303.storage: Store sealed in a cool, dry and ventilated place. Avoid moisture and high temperature.

hy-1322.product_introduction: HY-1322 Textile Cool-Touch Softener is a quaternary ammonium and polyether block-modified silicone emulsion for hydrophilic, soft, smooth and cool-touch finishing of textiles and plant-based paper. It combines the finishing compatibility of quaternary ammonium chemistry with polyether hydrophilicity, providing instant hydrophilicity, a cool silky hand feel and low yellowing.
features: Quaternary ammonium and polyether block-modified system balancing softness, smoothness and hydrophilicity.
Gives fabrics a cool, silky and skin-friendly touch.
Provides fast hydrophilicity for close-to-skin fabrics and home textiles.
Low yellowing, suitable for light-colored and premium fabrics.
Good process adaptability for exhaustion and padding processes.
how_to_use: Exhaustion/washing process: recommended dosage 0.5%-1% o.w.f. Add into water, stir evenly, fully soak fabric, then dewater and dry.
Padding process: recommended working bath 60-80g/L, one-dip-one-pad, then dry at 80-100°C for 5-10 minutes.
Trial testing is recommended before production according to fabric type, hydrophilicity target and desired hand feel.
typical_applications: Soft, hydrophilic and cool-touch finishing for cotton T-shirts, underwear and bedding
Hydrophilic smooth finishing for cotton-spandex, elastic knit and sports fabrics
Silky hydrophilic finishing for mercerized cotton shirts and premium knitwear
Hydrophilic, soft and smooth finishing for plant-based paper, tissue and wet-wipe paper
hy-1322.storage: Store sealed in a cool, dry and ventilated place at 5-35°C. Keep container sealed after use and avoid moisture and high temperature.

hy-1352.product_introduction: HY-1352 Leather Silky-Hand Finishing Agent is a high-concentration block-modified silicone emulsion for hand-feel finishing of leather, wool, cashmere, woolen fabrics, and wool-blend yarns and fabrics. It gives substrates excellent smoothness, rebound and gloss, improving the finished texture of leather and textile materials.
features: High-concentration block-modified silicone emulsion with strong hand-feel improvement.
Gives leather and wool-based fabrics a smooth, fine and silky touch.
Improves rebound and drape.
Enhances gloss and finished texture.
Good water solubility for easy bath preparation and process use.
how_to_use: Suitable for hand-feel finishing of leather, wool, cashmere, woolen and wool-blend fabrics.
Adjust dosage according to substrate type, gloss requirement and target hand feel.
Trial testing is recommended before scale-up to confirm hand feel, gloss and compatibility.
typical_applications: Silky smooth finishing for leather
Soft and smooth finishing for wool and cashmere fabrics
Texture improvement for woolen and wool-blend fabrics
Rebound and gloss finishing for wool-blend yarns and fabrics
hy-1352.storage: Store sealed in a cool, dry and ventilated place at 5-35°C. Keep container sealed after use and avoid moisture and high temperature.

hy-1355.product_introduction: HY-1355 Anti-Pilling Woven Hydrophilic Softener is a high-performance silicone oil emulsion developed for hydrophilic, soft, smooth and anti-pilling finishing of woven cotton fabrics and premium home-textile fabrics. It combines stability, hydrophilicity, softness and anti-pilling performance, giving woven cotton a fine smooth hand feel while maintaining good hydrophilicity.
features: Developed for woven cotton and premium home textiles with strong hydrophilic soft-smooth performance.
Combines soft hand feel with anti-pilling performance to improve fabric value.
Good resistance to auxiliaries and hard water; suitable for one-bath use with multiple textile auxiliaries.
Gives fabrics a fine, soft and smooth hand feel while maintaining hydrophilicity.
Environmentally friendly and transported as non-dangerous goods.
how_to_use: Padding reference process 1: HY-1355 (1:2 dilution) 40g/L, liquid cotton optical brightener 10g/L, anti-pilling agent 20g/L; one-dip-one-pad, pre-dry at 100°C, then set and dry at 170°C.
Padding reference process 2: HY-1355 (1:2 dilution) 40g/L, pigment 0.1g/L, anti-pilling agent 20g/L; one-dip-one-pad, then set and dry at 160-170°C.
Adjust formula according to target hydrophilicity, anti-pilling grade and hand feel. Trial testing is recommended before production.
typical_applications: Hydrophilic soft-smooth finishing for woven cotton fabrics
Anti-pilling hand-feel finishing for premium home textiles
One-bath finishing with brighteners, fixing agents, pigments and related textile auxiliaries
Fabric finishing requiring hydrophilicity, softness and anti-pilling performance
hy-1355.storage: Store sealed in a cool, dry and ventilated place at 5-35°C. Keep container sealed after use and avoid moisture and high temperature.

hy-1375.product_name: HY-1375 Denim Hand-Feel Brightening Finishing Agent
hy-1375.product_introduction: HY-1375 Denim Hand-Feel Brightening Finishing Agent is a high-molecular emulsion polymerized from high-viscosity modified silicone polysiloxane, designed as a new-generation smooth bright finishing agent for denim fabrics. It gives denim excellent gloss and smooth hand feel, improves color brightness and reduces roughness.
features: Designed for smooth bright finishing of denim fabrics, improving gloss and smoothness.
Reduces denim roughness and improves wearing comfort.
Enhances color brightness and gives a bright, oily touch.
Helps improve drape and tear strength.
Stable emulsion with broad adaptability for denim laundries and textile mills.
how_to_use: Use in denim after-finishing processes and adjust dosage according to target gloss, hand feel and color effect.
Suitable for partial or overall spray finishing to give fabrics a special bright, oily texture.
Trial testing is recommended before production to confirm gloss, hand feel, shade and process compatibility.
typical_applications: Smooth bright finishing for cotton and blended denim fabrics
After-finishing for jeans, denim jackets, denim skirts and related garments
Texture improvement for denim bags, shoes, hats and decorative fabrics
Partial or overall spray brightening finishing for denim textiles
hy-1375.storage: Store sealed in a cool, dry and ventilated place at 5-35°C. Keep container sealed after use and avoid moisture and high temperature.

hy-1378.product_name: HY-1378 Cotton Soft-Fluffy Textile Finishing Agent
hy-1378.product_introduction: HY-1378 Cotton Soft-Fluffy Textile Finishing Agent is developed for hand-feel finishing of cotton fabrics, including knitted cotton, woven cotton and cotton towels. It gives fabrics hydrophilic, soft, smooth and fluffy hand feel while offering good stability and process adaptability.
features: Developed for cotton fibers and cotton fabric hand-feel finishing.
Gives fabrics hydrophilic, soft, smooth and fluffy hand feel.
Suitable for towels, knitted cotton and woven cotton fabrics.
Maintains good absorbency after finishing and helps avoid hydrophobic stiffness.
Good stability and process adaptability for padding and exhaustion processes.
how_to_use: Padding process: recommended dilution ratio 1:2, working bath 10-60g/L, one-dip-one-pad followed by setting/drying. Recommended drying is 80-100°C for 5-10 minutes.
Exhaustion/washing process: recommended dilution ratio 1:2 and dosage 1%-3% on dry fabric weight. Fully soak fabric, dewater and dry.
Adjust dosage according to fabric structure, fullness and hydrophilicity requirements. Trial testing is recommended before production.
typical_applications: Soft, smooth, fluffy and absorbent finishing for cotton towels
Skin-friendly smooth finishing for knitted T-shirts, underwear and homewear
Soft hydrophilic finishing for woven cotton, cotton shirts and cotton bedding
Comfort hand-feel improvement for cotton fibers and fabrics
hy-1378.storage: Store sealed in a cool, dry and ventilated place at 5-35°C. Keep container sealed after use and avoid moisture and high temperature.

hy-09n.series: Long-Chain Alkyl Phenyl Modified Silicone Oil

typical_properties.appearance: Light yellow to colorless transparent liquid

hy-09n.product_introduction: HY-09N long-chain alkyl phenyl silicone oil is made from organosilicon monomers/materials through multi-component modification, offering a unique structure, simple use, strong isolation/lubrication performance and heat resistance.
features: Non-toxic and non-corrosive; can be diluted with alcohol solvents without harmful fumes.
Excellent lubricity and impact resistance for easy, damage-free demolding while protecting molds.
Easy to use and emulsify, and miscible with mineral oil in any proportion.
Provides lubricity, oil solubility, abrasion resistance, defoaming, anti-sticking and printability.
Strong affinity with organic materials for isolation, lubrication and release applications.
how_to_use: Conduct small-sample trials first to determine the final application method and dosage for each use case.
Can be added in small amounts to mineral oil to improve high/low temperature resistance and extreme-pressure lubrication.
typical_applications: Lubrication and die-casting release for magnesium, zinc and other metals
Base oil for high-lubricity silicone grease
Release for plastic, rubber and PU products
Isolation, lubrication and release for multiple material types
hy-09n.storage: Transport and store as non-dangerous goods. Store in a dry, ventilated and cool place at ≥5°C. Avoid strong sunlight and contact with acids or alkalis.

typical_properties.appearance: Milky white liquid, free of mechanical impurities
typical_properties.stability: No stratification after 20 minutes at 3000 r/min

hy-6014.product_introduction: HY-6014 is a macromolecular silicone material prepared by emulsion polymerization of high-purity octamethylcyclosiloxane with anionic surfactant. It is designed for tire production and helps tires release from molds in vulcanization processes.
features: Water-dilutable tire bladder lubricating release agent with easy atomization.
Sprayed onto hot mold surfaces and provides release after curing.
Water-based, non-polluting and non-flammable, suitable for tire production.
Provides long-lasting release performance and is not prone to mold contamination.
Leaves no greasy feel on the tire surface after vulcanization and does not affect subsequent surface processing.
Can replace DOWSIL FBL-3289, WACKER E 22, DOWSIL HV 495, Elkem EMUL 8455 and similar grades.
how_to_use: Stir the product evenly and place it in the spraying device. Spray uniformly on hot mold surfaces and use after water evaporates.
A 0.6mm-0.8mm nozzle is recommended for good atomization.
Recommended dosage: PCR tires can vulcanize about 10-20 tires per spray; TBR tires can be sprayed once per shift.
This product is an anionic system. Check compatibility when compounded with other materials, especially cationic systems, to prevent emulsion breaking.
typical_applications: Tire vulcanization release
Tire bladder lubricating release
Hot mold surface spray release
PCR tire production
TBR tire production
hy-6014.storage: Store in a ventilated, cool and dry place. Avoid contact with strong acids and alkalis. Warehouse temperature should not be below 5°C to prevent freezing and emulsion breaking, and should not exceed 40°C. Transport and store as non-dangerous goods.

hy-161.product_introduction: HY-161 is a special polyether polyol with very low toxicity. It is used for formulating low-sudsing, high-cleaning synthetic detergents, and can also be used as a pharmaceutical excipient and emulsifier.
features: Low-sudsing with strong cleaning performance for synthetic detergent systems.
Very low toxicity and suitable as a pharmaceutical excipient and emulsifier.
Can be used as an antifoaming agent in papermaking or fermentation industries.
Polyethers can also be used in crude oil demulsification applications.
Not classified as hazardous chemicals.
typical_applications: Low-sudsing high-cleaning synthetic detergents
Pharmaceutical excipient and emulsifier
Oral nasal sprays, eye/ear drops and shampoos
Papermaking or fermentation antifoaming
Crude oil demulsification
hy-161.storage: Store and transport as non-hazardous chemicals. Keep sealed.

hy-246.product_introduction: HY-246 is a water-based metalworking fluid emulsifier. It is also used in industrial cleaning, textile and coating applications, featuring high HLB, enhanced hydrophilicity, ultra-low foam and low-temperature stability.
features: High HLB, enhanced hydrophilicity and ultra-low foam.
Low-temperature stability and compatibility with medium-to-high oil content systems.
Superior calcium soap dispersion and hard-water resistance.
Strong oil-water emulsification, foam inhibition and improved system stability.
Particularly suitable for low-temperature and low-foam continuous processes.
how_to_use: Recommended dosage range is 0.1%-3%. The actual dosage should be determined by application testing.
typical_applications: Water-based metalworking fluid emulsifier
Industrial cleaning
Textile and coating systems
Heavy oil contamination cleaning
High-pressure spraying and hard-water cleaning conditions
